name: dmarcguard
desc: 🛡️ A lightweight, self-hosted DMARC report parser with a beautiful Vue.js dashboard. Single-binary deployment with IMAP integration, SQLite storage, and RFC 7…
descFull: 🛡️ A lightweight, self-hosted DMARC report parser with a beautiful Vue.js dashboard. Single-binary deployment with IMAP integration, SQLite storage, and RFC 7489 compliance. Built with Go and Vue 3 - no external dependencies required.
